title: Reduce water use during maintenance, urges Mossel Bay Municipality
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The Mossel Bay Municipality has urged its residents to reduce water use immediately during some planned maintenance to a 800mm pipeline.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has urged its residents to reduce water use immediately during some planned maintenance to a 800mm pipeline."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Langeberg Reservoir dropped from 99% to 97% in just 45 minutes since the closure of the pipeline this morning, Monday 24 November, said the municipality.","html":"The Langeberg Reservoir dropped from 99% to 97% in just 45 minutes since the closure of the pipeline this morning, Monday 24 November, said the municipality."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It said residents’ co-operation is critical to safeguard supply during the final repairs. It issued notices of the repairs ahead of today’s pipeline closure."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It listed key dates and actions as follows:• Now: Cut water use as much as possible• 24 to 28 November: Pipeline repair period - savings essential• Until 5 December: Continue with reduced use to refill reservoirs.","html":"It listed key dates and actions as follows:
• Now: Cut water use as much as possible
• 24 to 28 November: Pipeline repair period - savings essential
• Until 5 December: Continue with reduced use to refill reservoirs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality said it sincerely apologised for any inconvenience and emphasised: “Ongoing maintenance is vital to ensure the longevity of our infrastructure and the sustainability of essential services for all residents.”","html":"The municipality said it sincerely apologised for any inconvenience and emphasised: “Ongoing maintenance is vital to ensure the longevity of our infrastructure and the sustainability of essential services for all residents.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Reduce water use during maintenance, urges Mossel Bay Municipality
